diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Five-state process model showing all possible transitions between process states
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process lifecycle and state transitions in operating systems

diagrams.title: Process Control Block Structure
diagrams.description: Internal structure of PCB showing all components stored by OS for each process
diagrams.purpose: Understanding what information OS maintains about each process

diagrams.title: Memory Layout of a Process
diagrams.description: Typical memory organization of a process in user space
diagrams.purpose: Understanding process memory organization and separation of code, data, and stack
